title: lepidaploa glabra
intro: Lepidaploa glabra, also known as Smooth Mist Flower or Brazilian Mist Flower, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Brazil and Argentina. The medicinal properties of Lepidaploa glabra are attributed to its antinociceptive, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe pain and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Lepidaploa glabra include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
